skills.description: Phoveus lowers his monolith and releases his demonic power in the target direction, knocking enemies airborne, dragging them along, and dealing 250 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Magic Damage.

skills.name: Infernal Pursuit
skills.description: Passive: Demonic Force, Astaros Eye, and Dark Wave can apply Sinner's Mark to enemy heroes hit. Active: Phoveus leaps into the air and smashes down with his monolith at the enemy hero with Sinner's Mark, dealing 250 (+100% Total Physical Attack) (+5% target's Max HP) Physical Damage to enemies in the area while Phoveus recovers 50 (+ 6% Lost HP). Infernal Pursuit can only be used when there are enemies with Sinner's Mark nearby. The HP recovered is reduced by 80% when hitting multiple enemies.

skills.name: We Are Friends
skills.description: Kupa recovers 10% Max HP per second after not taking damage for 5s. When Kupa is killed, Popol can (Pray) for 3s to bring Kupa back to the battlefield. Cooldown: 30s. Every 3 consecutive attacks from Kupa will enhance Popol's next Basic Attack to deal ( +220% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). Kupa has 2500 ( +1200% Total Physical Attack) Max HP and inherits 100% of Popol's other attributes and passive equipment effects (excluding Jungling and Roaming equipment effects). Kupa deals an additional damage against Creeps.

skills.name: Bite 'em, Kupa!
skills.description: Popol throws a spear at the target enemy, dealing 80( +100% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) while simultaneously commanding Kupa to lunge at the target, dealing an additional 100( +75% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). Kupa will continue to attack the target for 3s. (Alpha Wolf Form): Kupa stuns the enemy for 1s and bites them 3 times in quick succession.

skills.name: Kupa, Help!
skills.description: Popol summons Kupa back to his side, gaining a 240( +200% Extra Physical Attack) shield while dealing 240( +50% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to nearby enemies and slowing them by 35% for 0.5s. Kupa will then assist Popol to attack nearby enemies for 3s. (Alpha Wolf Form): Kupa darts back to Popol, knocking nearby enemies airborne for 0.2s. The shield and damage are increased to 125%.

skills.name: Popol's Surprise
skills.description: Popol sets a trap at the target location that will detonate after a short delay once triggered, dealing 70( +20% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to the enemy that steps on it, immobilizing them for 1s, and creating a frost zone for 4s. Enemies in the frost zone will have their Movement Speed reduced by 20%. Popol gains a trap charge every 22s (up to 3). Up to 3 traps can exist at the same time on the battlefield, each lasting up to 60s.

skills.name: Divine Resurrection
skills.description: Rafaela can cast a special skill every 10s. After channeling for 2.5s, she instantly resurrects an ally and increases their Movement Speed by 30% for 5s (taking damage from heroes and Legend Creeps interrupts channeling and puts the skill on base cooldown). This skill's cooldown is increased by 600% of the target's remaining respawn time, capped at 240s. This skill is not affected by Cooldown Reduction.

skills.name: Light of Retribution
skills.description: Rafaela strikes the three nearest enemies with (Light of Retribution), dealing them 225( +120% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage), briefly revealing their positions, and slowing them by 40% for 1.5s. Enemies hit by (Light of Retribution) again within 5s will take 20% extra damage (this effect stacks up to 3 times).

skills.name: Holy Healing
skills.description: Rafaela calls upon (Holy Light), restoring 100( +35% Total Magic Power) HP to nearby allied heroes, plus an additional 150( +45% Total Magic Power) HP to herself and the most injured allied hero in range. Also increases the Movement Speed of nearby allied heroes by 30% and grants Slow Immunity for 1s. Every 20 point(s) of Magic Power will add 1% to the Movement Speed bonus.

skills.name: Holy Baptism
skills.description: Rafaela unleashes the true power of (Holy Light) in the target direction, dealing 460( +120% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies in a line and stunning them for 1.2s.

skills.name: Full Moon Curse
skills.description: Roger can freely switch between human and wolf forms. In human form, Roger's Basic Attack and skills deal additional damage equal to 5% of the target's current HP. In wolf form, Roger's Basic Attack and skills deal additional damage equal to 5% of the target's lost HP. This effect can only deal up to 60 additional damage against Creeps.

skills.name: Open Fire
skills.description: Roger fires two quick shots in the target direction, dealing 250( +125% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) in total to the enemy hit. The first shot is a hunter net that slows the enemy by 80% for 1.5s, while the second is a bullet that reduces the enemy's Physical Defense by 10 for 5s.

skills.name: Hunter's Steps
skills.description: Roger gains 20% Movement Speed and 20% Attack Speed for 2.5s.

skills.name: Wolf Transformation
skills.description: Roger lunges in the target direction and turns into wolf form, dealing 150 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 90% for 0.8s. Passive: In wolf form, Roger gains 20 Physical & Magic Defense and 25 Movement Speed.

skills.name: Let's Dance!
skills.description: Ruby starts with 10% Spell Vamp and her skills have a 125% Spell Vamp Ratio (but her Basic Attacks cannot trigger Lifesteal). After each skill cast, Ruby can dash to another location and gain 9 (+1.8*Hero Level) Physical & Magic Defense (scales with level) for 4s (stacks up to 3 times).

skills.name: Be Good!
skills.description: Ruby swings her scythe, dealing 90( +70% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies hit. She then unleashes a shockwave in the same direction, dealing 90( +70% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies hit and slowing them by 40% for 2s.

skills.name: Don't Run, Wolf King!
skills.description: Ruby swings her scythe around herself twice, each swing dealing 60( +55% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to nearby enemies, stunning them for 0.5s, and slowly pulling them toward her.

skills.name: I'm Offended!
skills.description: Ruby sweeps her scythe in the target direction, dealing 200( +200% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies hit, pulling them toward her, and stunning them for 0.5s.

skills.name: Enemy's Bane
skills.description: Saber's attacks reduce enemies' Physical Defense by 3-8 for 5s on hit. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

skills.name: Orbiting Swords
skills.description: Saber releases 5 swords that orbit around him and deal 80( +30% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to nearby enemies on hit. The swords will retract back to him after a while. When the swords are present, Saber sends a sword at his target on each attack, dealing 210( +60% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to the target and 50% of the damage to other enemies it passes through (damage against Minions is reduced to 50%). Each sword attack also reduces the cooldown of (Charge) by 1s.

skills.name: Charge
skills.description: Saber dashes in the target direction, dealing 75( +50% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies along the way while enhancing his next Basic Attack. The enhanced Basic Attack deals 75( +120% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) and slows the target by 60% for 1s.

skills.name: Triple Sweep
skills.description: Saber charges at the target enemy hero, knocking them airborne for 1.2s and striking them 3 times over the duration. The first two strikes deal 120( +100% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) each, while the third strike deals 240( +200% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage).

skills.name: Symbiosis
skills.description: Selena can switch freely between her two forms. (Elven Form): Selena applies (Abyssal Mark) when her skills deal damage. Marks last 8s and can stack up to 2 times. (Abyssal Form): Selena's Basic Attacks become melee and deal ( +25% Total Magic Power) additional (Magic Damage). Her skills deal 240-450( +40% Total Magic Power) additional (Magic Damage) to enemies with (Abyssal Mark) and reduce their mark stacks by 1. This damage is increased to 200% against Creeps.

skills.name: Abyssal Trap
skills.description: Selena summons an Abyssal Devil to lurk underground. The Abyssal Devil will attach itself to any enemy that approaches, inflicting a stack of (Abyssal Mark) and reducing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1s. The Abyssal Devil then explodes, dealing 350( +150% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies in the area and reducing their Movement Speed by 50% for 1s. Each additional Abyssal Devil on an enemy increases the final damage by 50%. Each Abyssal Devil can lurk up to 60s and up to 3 Abyssal Devils can exist at the same time.

skills.name: Abyssal Arrow
skills.description: Selena fires an abyssal wraith in the target direction that stops when it hits an enemy hero, Creep, or Summon, dealing 250( +20% Total Magic Power) to 500( +40% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to the target hit and stunning them for 0.5s to 3s (the damage and stun duration increase with the wraith's travel distance). The wraith will pick up (Abyssal Trap) as it travels over it and will apply the traps to the enemy target upon stunning them. If the wraith stuns an enemy for 1s or longer, Selena will gain 40% Movement Speed for 2s.

skills.name: Primal Darkness
skills.description: Selena enters Abyssal Form and gains 20% Movement Speed for 0.8s. This also immediately resets the cooldown of (Soul Eater) and (Garotte).

skills.name: Knightess' Resolve
skills.description: Silvanna's Basic Attacks deal 25( +45% Total Physical Attack) (+75% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage). Silvanna's attacks apply a mark on enemy heroes for 5s on hit, each mark reducing their Physical & Magic Defense by 3-6 (up to 5 stacks). Silvanna deals 30% extra damage to enemy heroes with the max number of marks.

skills.name: Cometic Lance
skills.description: Silvanna dashes forward. Upon reaching the max range or hitting a non-Minion enemy, she swings her lance, dealing 250( +100% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to nearby enemies and stunning them for 1s.

skills.name: Spiral Strangling
skills.description: Silvanna thrusts her lance in the target direction and spins it 6 times while gaining a 350( +150% Total Magic Power) shield. Each spin deals 165( +45% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) and slightly pulls targets toward the center. Silvanna spins 1 additional time for every 50% of extra Attack Speed she possesses. The skill deals only 50% damage against Minions. (Spiral Strangling) counts as a Basic Attack but cannot Crit.

skills.name: Imperial Justice
skills.description: Silvanna leaps to the target location and creates a Circle of Light upon landing, dealing 350( +110% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies in the area, slowing them by 40% for 1.5s, and restraining the closest enemy hero to the area for 3.5s. (This skill cannot be interrupted.) Silvanna gains 100% Attack Speed and 40% Lifesteal when in the Circle.

skills.name: Mystic Surge
skills.description: Sora can ascend to Thunder or Torrent by using his Ultimate. After ascending, dealing damage to heroes or summoned units grants 1 stack of Cloudstep. Upon reaching 5 stacks, he unlocks his True Art. Thunder: Adopts an assassin style, converting 30% Max HP into Physical Attack (Equal to 10% of Max HP). Torrent: Adopts a tank style, converting 30% Physical Attack into Max HP (Gains 10 HP for every 1 Attack).

skills.name: Sundering Strike
skills.description: Sora strikes twice, dealing 140 (+50% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage, then lunges forward, dealing 240 (+5% Total HP) Physical Damage. He can dash after striking.

skills.name: Windstride
skills.description: Sora leaps forward, dealing 140 (+55% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage. If he hits an enemy hero or reaches max range, he slams the ground, dealing an additional 140 (+8% Total HP) Physical Damage and slowing them by 40% for 0.5s. Successful hits reduce the cooldown by 2s.

skills.name: Shifting Skies
skills.description: Swipe left to ascend into Thunder for 10s. Sora gains a brief bonus Movement Speed and becomes untargetable. He then summons lightning to strike nearby enemies 3 time(s), each dealing 140 (+50% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage. Swipe right to ascend into Torrent for 10s. Sora gains Control Immunity. After a short delay, he pulls nearby enemies in and deals 250 (+8% Total HP) Physical Damage.

skills.name: Simian God
skills.description: Enemies hit by Sun and his Doppelgangers will have their Physical Defense reduced by 4% (stacks up to 10 times). Sun recovers HP equal to 50% of the Doppelganger's Physical Attack each time a Doppelganger deals damage.

skills.name: Endless Variety
skills.description: Sun hurls his (Golden Staff) in the target direction, dealing 200( +40% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in its path. Upon hitting an enemy hero or Creep, or reaching the maximum range, the (Golden Staff) morphs into a Doppelganger that lasts 5s and inherits 40% of Sun's attributes (and a portion of his Attack Effects). (Endless Variety) and (Swift Exchange) are learned and upgraded together and share the same cooldown.

skills.name: Swift Exchange
skills.description: Sun hurls his (Golden Staff) in the target direction, dealing 200( +40% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in its path. He conjures a Doppelganger at his location that lasts 5s and inherits 40% of his attributes (and a portion of Attack Effects), conceals himself, and moves with the (Golden Staff). Sun reappears and retrieves the (Golden Staff) when it hits an enemy hero or reaches the maximum range.

skills.name: Instantaneous Move
skills.description: Sun commands his Doppelgangers to strike at the target enemy with him, dealing 170( +40% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to the target and enemies behind them. This counts as Basic Attack damage and can trigger Attack Effects but cannot Crit.

skills.name: Transient Immortal
skills.description: Tap-casting any skill will put Suyou in his Mortal form, granting him 40 Movement Speed and decreasing the interval between Basic Attacks. Hold-casting any skill will put Suyou in his Immortal form, increasing the damage of Basic Attacks to 125% and granting him 20% Physical Damage Reduction. In this form, for every 20 extra Physical Attack Suyou has, he gains 1% Physical Damage Reduction (up to 40%).

skills.name: Blade Surge
skills.description: Tap: Suyou throws his weapon in the target direction, dealing 250 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in its path. Suyou then blinks to the weapon's location, catches it, and performs a slash in the opposite direction, dealing 375 (+150% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage. Hold: Suyou channels the Immortal's power and charges in the target direction, dealing 250 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies along the path. When hitting an enemy hero, he stops and stuns enemies in a rectangular area in front for 0.6s. The charge distance increases with the hold time. Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted.

skills.name: Soul Sever
skills.description: Tap: Suyou performs a sweeping attack with his weapon, dealing Physical Damage equal to 280 (+200% Extra Physical Attack) plus 15% of target's Lost HP to enemies in a fan-shaped area. Hold: Suyou channels the power of the Immortal to perform 3 cleaves in a fan-shaped area. The first two strikes deal 225 (+80% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage each, while the final strike deals 360 (+128% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage and recovers 150 (+50% Extra Physical Attack) HP for himself.

skills.name: Evil Queller
skills.description: Tap: Suyou glides backward and swings his weapon in the target direction, dealing 420 (+120% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in a rectangular area and on his path backward, and reducing their Movement Speed by 30% for 1.5s. Hold: Suyou uses the Immortal's power to shoot a deadly arrow in the target direction, dealing 580 (+165% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the target hit. The range increases with the hold time. Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted.

skills.name: Body of Smith
skills.description: Terizla gains 1% extra Damage Reduction (up to 30%) for every 2.5% HP lost. He cannot gain extra Attack Speed and will convert every 1% extra Attack Speed he's supposed to receive into 1 extra Physical Attack.

skills.name: Revenge Strike
skills.description: Terizla cracks the ground with his hammer and the fissure will spread out, dealing 300( +80% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). After the fissure hits the first target, it will drill into the target and slow them by 15%. At the same time, Terizla's Movement Speed will be increased by 15% for 3.5s. The fissure on target will then explode, dealing 300( +80% Extra Physical Attack) plus 20% of the enemy's lost HP (Physical Damage).

skills.name: Execution Strike
skills.description: Terizla swings his hammer in a fan-shaped area ahead. This skill can be cast up to 3 times. The first two attacks deal 135( +160% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) each, while the third deals 225( +220% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). Enemies hit will also be slowed by 20% for 1.25s (the Slowing Effect can stack). Deals only 60% damage to Minions.

skills.name: Penalty Zone
skills.description: Terizla jumps to the designated area, dealing 300( +100% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) and knocking enemies airborne for 0.6s. He then summons Scaffold and slows enemies by 25%. Scaffold will send out a hook at enemy heroes in range and pull them several times while dealing 150( +30% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) each time.

skills.name: Grand Lord Lava
skills.description: When Thamuz is holding his (Scythes), each of his Basic Attacks has a chance to conjure a burst of Lava Energy beneath the target that erupts after a 0.7s delay, dealing 50( +110% Total Physical Attack) (True Damage). When without (Scythes), Thamuz gains 25% extra Movement Speed and will enhance his next Basic Attack after retrieving the (Scythes). The enhanced Basic Attack slows the target by 30% and is guaranteed to trigger Lava Energy.

skills.name: Molten Scythes
skills.description: Thamuz tosses (Scythes) in the target direction. After travelling for a certain distance or hitting the first enemy hero, they deal 120( +60% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). The (Scythes) will then slow nearby enemies by 30% and deal 45( +20% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) every 0.5s. After leaving Thamuz for a period of time or a certain distance, the (Scythes) will return to Thamuz and drag enemies in their path to him. Thamuz can approach the Scythes or cast the skill again to retrieve them.

skills.name: Chasm Trample
skills.description: Thamuz jumps to a designated area to deal 230( +60% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) and slow the enemy units by 25% for 2s upon landing. If the Scythes are still travelling, they will return to Thamuz and (Molten Scythes) will reset its CD instantly.

skills.name: Cauterant Inferno
skills.description: Thamuz spouts the lava stored in his body, dealing 300( +80% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to nearby enemies and creating a (Cauterant Zone) around him. The (Cauterant Zone) lasts 9s and deals 30( +10% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) every 0.5s to enemies in the area. Meanwhile, Thamuz gains 500 extra Max HP, heals himself by the same amount, and increases his Attack Speed by 1.3 times. He also recovers 1.5% Max HP each time he deals damage with Basic Attacks or his (Scythes).

skills.name: Fearless
skills.description: Tigreal gains a stack of (Fearless) each time he uses a skill or is hit by a Basic Attack. After getting 4 stacks, Tigreal will consume all (Fearless) stacks to block the next incoming Basic Attack (including attacks from Turrets). [C8Attacks from Minions do not grant] (Fearless) [C8stacks nor trigger its effect].

skills.name: Attack Wave
skills.description: Tigreal smashes the ground with his hammer and sends a shockwave that erupts 3 times in the target direction, each time dealing 270( +70% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies along the fan-shaped area and slowing them by 20%/40%/60% for 1.5s.

skills.name: Sacred Hammer
skills.description: Tigreal charges in the target direction, dealing ( +100% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies along the way and pushing them to the end of the charge. (Use Again): Tigreal can use this skill again within 4s, dealing 280( +60% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in front of him and knocking them airborne for 1s.

skills.name: Implosion
skills.description: Tigreal unleashes the power of his hammer, stunning and pulling nearby enemies to him for 2s while dealing 270( +130% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). [C8The first half of the channeling can be interrupted by control effects. The second half of the channeling can only be interrupted by Suppression.]

skills.name: Radiance
skills.description: Uranus absorbs the energy generated by incoming attacks to strengthen himself, regenerating a certain amount of HP every 0.8s. Each stack lasts 10s. When at max stacks (20), Uranus regenerates 48-224 HP (scales with level).

skills.name: Ionic Edge
skills.description: Uranus releases two energy blades that orbit around him, dealing 155( +30% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemy targets and slowing them by 30% for 2s. Each time this skill deals damage to a target, they will be marked with a stack for 6s (max of 1 stack per target per cast). Each stack increases the damage of this skill by 40% (to a max of 320%). Each energy blade will only deal damage to the same target once.

skills.name: Transcendent Ward
skills.description: Uranus charges to the target location, dealing 80( +20% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies along the way, and 160( +80% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies at the target location and slowing them by 25%. Uranus also generates a 300( +200% Total Magic Power) shield for 4s. The shield explodes at the end of its duration or when destroyed, dealing 300( +150% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies nearby.

skills.name: Consecration
skills.description: Uranus unleashes the energy stored within his body, removing slow effects on himself, recovering 200 HP, and gaining 60% Movement Speed for 8s (decays over time). Uranus directly gains 5 stacks of Radiance, increasing shields received and HP Regen by 20% for 8s.

skills.name: Windtalk
skills.description: Vale gains 1 stack of (Windtalk) each time he gets a kill or an assist that increases his Movement Speed by 8. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

skills.name: Wind Blade
skills.description: Vale unleashes two wind blades toward the left and right of a target area, each dealing 250( +80% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies hit.

skills.name: Windblow
skills.description: Vale sends a whirlwind in the target direction, dealing 300( +40% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies hit and knocking them airborne for 1s (each enemy can only be knocked airborne 1 time). When the whirlwind reaches its destination, it will remain for 1.6s while continuously dealing a total of 200( +80% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies in range.

skills.name: Windstorm
skills.description: Vale summons a windstorm at the target location, dealing a total of 150( +40% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies in the area and slowing them by 20% while continuously pulling them into its center. After 1.6s, the windstorm will explode, dealing 1000( +200% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage). The remaining whirlwinds will also be pulled into the center.

skills.name: Primal Force
skills.description: Valentina gains 8-50 extra EXP each time she deals damage to an enemy hero. Cooldown: 2s. If the enemy hero's level isn't higher than Valentina's, 30% of the damage dealt is converted into her HP. The EXP scales with Valentina's level.

skills.name: Shadow Strike
skills.description: Valentina casts (Shadow Strike) in the target direction, dealing 300( +165% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies hit and slowing them by 40% for 1s. Enemy heroes hit by (Shadow Strike) are marked with a Shadow Sigil for 4s and will be (terrified) for 1s when hit by (Shadow Strike) again within the duration (a unit can only be terrified once within 4s).

skills.name: Arcane Shade
skills.description: Valentina dashes in the target direction, firing 3 Shadow Bolts at nearby enemies that deal 125( +30% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) each. Valentina can cast this skill again within 6s (costs Mana). The cooldown of (Shadow Strike) is reduced by 1s each time a Shadow Bolt hits an enemy.

skills.name: I Am You
skills.description: Valentina slows the target enemy hero by 70% for 0.5s and gains the ability to cast their (Ultimate). Casting the enemy's (Ultimate) turns Valentina into the enemy hero's form and allows her to inherit their Basic Attack type for up to 12s. Her skills remain unchanged unless the enemy's (Ultimate) has a (Morph) effect. The stolen (Ultimate)'s level will be equal to Valentina's (Ultimate) level and the cooldown will be 120% of the target's cooldown (but no lower than 10s). Valentina gains ( +100% Total Magic Power) (Physical Attack) for the duration if the enemy is a Physical Damage hero. This cannot be used on an enemy Valentina.

skills.name: Ashing
skills.description: Valir's skills apply a stack of Ablaze to enemies hit, dealing them (Magic Damage) equal to 0.6% of their Max HP per second for 4s. At 3 stacks, the fire detonates, dealing (Magic Damage) equal to 6% of the target's Max HP to the enemy and stunning them for 1s (the same target can only be stunned by Valir's skills once every 7s.)

skills.name: Burst Fireball
skills.description: Valir launches a fireball that explodes upon hitting the first target, dealing 235( +80% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) and slowing them by 30% for 1s. The lingering flame on the ground will explode after 1s, dealing 118( +40% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage). Valir recharges 1 fireball every 9s and can hold up to 2 fireball charges. Hitting an enemy hero or Legend Creep with this skill will immediately restore a fireball charge, while hitting a Minion will restore 50% of the recharge time. Once enhanced by (Vengeance Flame), the cast range of (Burst Fireball) increases by 30%.

skills.name: Searing Torrent
skills.description: Valir unleashes a torrent of flames in the target direction, dealing 200( +60% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies hit and knocking them to the end of its path. (Vengeance Flame): The torrent forms a firewall at the end of its path that lasts 4s and deals 80( +24% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to nearby enemies per second. Enemies hit by the torrent or the firewall are slowed by 25% for 1s.

skills.name: Vengeance Flame
skills.description: Valir removes all debuffs on himself and conjures 4 (Vengeance Flames) that last 9s. Each of his subsequent skills consumes 1 (Vengeance Flame) to deal 30% extra base damage. The effects of both (Burst Fireball) and (Searing Torrent) can be enhanced. Meanwhile, Valir gains 40% extra Movement Speed that decays over 3s.

skills.name: Nether Touch
skills.description: Vexana and the (Eternal Guard) inflict (Nether Curse) on enemies hit. The Curse lasts 5s and will cause the affected enemy to explode upon death, dealing 108-500( +60% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to nearby enemies (base damage scales with level).

skills.name: Deathly Grasp
skills.description: Vexana unleashes a (Deathly Grasp) in the target direction, dealing 200( +60% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies in its path. The projectile stops upon hitting an enemy hero, terrifying them and knocking them back, then it explodes, dealing 200( +60% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to nearby enemies and terrifying them for 1s.

skills.name: Cursed Blast
skills.description: Vexana marks the target area with the power of the undead, striking it after a 0.8s delay and dealing 580( +165% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies hit.

skills.name: Eternal Guard
skills.description: Vexana summons an (Eternal Guard) at the target location, dealing 500( +60% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies hit and knocking them airborne for 0.8s. The (Eternal Guard) then joins Vexana in battle for 15s. Each of the Eternal Guard's attacks deals 225( +40% Total Magic Power) plus 5% of the target's Max HP as (Magic Damage) to enemies in a large area.

skills.name: Tiger Pace
skills.description: Enemy heroes hit by Wanwan's attacks will have their weakness exposed and position revealed for 5s. When hitting an enemy's weakness, Wanwan deals 67(+3*Hero Level) extra (True Damage) and increases their damage taken from her subsequent attacks by 10% for 5s. Wanwan can dash a short distance after each arrow fired from her Basic Attack. The dash speed scales with her Attack Speed. Wanwan's Basic Attack deals ( +100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage.

skills.name: Swallow’s Path
skills.description: Wanwan throws a Fire Swallow in the target direction, triggering (Tiger Pace) while dealing 120( +40% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in its path. The Fire Swallow then turns into 3 rotating Swallow Daggers. After a short delay, these Swallow Daggers will fly back to Wanwan one after another, dealing 60( +65% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies on their way back and slowing them by 30% for 1.5s. Enemies hit twice by the Swallow Daggers will be immobilized for 0.5s.

skills.name: Needles in Flowers
skills.description: Wanwan removes all control effects on herself and triggers (Tiger Pace). Meanwhile, she shoots Deadly Needles in all directions, dealing 150( +60% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies hit.

skills.name: Crossbow of Tang
skills.description: Wanwan leaps into the air and fires arrows at the target enemy hero for 2.5s in rapid succession, dealing 60( +35% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) per arrow. If the target is killed during this attack, Wanwan will switch to another enemy hero in her attack range, gain 30% Attack Speed, and extend the skill duration by 1s (this effect can trigger up to 3 times). Wanwan is untargetable and invincible for the duration and can trigger (Tiger Pace) upon killing an enemy and at the end of the duration. (Crossbow of Tang) can only be cast on enemy heroes with all their weaknesses hit and Wanwan gains 100% Movement Speed during the duration. This damage is regarded as Basic Attack damage, and the firing rate scales with Wanwan's Attack Speed.

skills.name: Firaga Armor
skills.description: X.Borg's Firaga Armor inherits 120% of his Max HP and absorbs all incoming damage when it's active. When the Armor is destroyed, X.Borg will disengage from it and roll in the direction of the Joystick (he is immune to damage during this process). The Armor's energy will gradually regenerate while X.Borg is in the Armorless State. At full energy, X.Borg re-equips the Armor and restores it to 30% of his Max HP. X.Borg's fire damage causes enemies to heat up. Enemies at maximum temperature will drop Firaga supplies when they take fire damage from X.Borg. Picking up a Firaga supply restores 10% of the Armor's HP, or 10 energy while in the Armorless State.

skills.name: Fire Missiles
skills.description: X.Borg sprays fire in the target direction, dealing 25( +60% Total Physical Attack) (+40% Total Magic Power) (Physical Damage) 7 times over 2s to enemies in range (only deals 75% damage against Minions). Enemies at maximum temperature are dealt (True Damage) instead. (Armorless) State: The attack area becomes narrower but longer, while the damage is reduced to 60% of that in (Armored) state.

skills.name: Fire Stake
skills.description: X.Borg shoots 5 Fire Stakes at the edge of the fan-shaped indicator and retrieves them after 1.7s, each dealing 50( +20% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) and pulling the enemies in the path toward him. Firaga Supplies in the path will also be retrieved if touched by Fire Stakes. (Armorless) State: X.Borg adjusts Fire Stake Launcher to increase its range and shorten the distance between Fire Stakes.

skills.name: Last Insanity
skills.description: X.Borg charges in the target direction while rotating and spraying fire, dealing 200( +130% Extra Physical Attack) (+90% Total Magic Power) (Physical Damage) 7 times and slowing enemies hit by 25%. He stops upon running into an enemy hero and will slow them by an additional 40%. After 3s from the start of the skill, X.Borg's (Firaga Armor) will detonate, dealing (True Damage) to nearby enemies equal to 300 plus 15% of their Max HP. If the Armor is destroyed before it can self-detonate, it will only deal 50% of the damage. When his Armor detonates, X.Borg will dash a short distance in the Joystick's direction and enter the (Armorless) state while removing all debuffs from himself. This skill cannot be used in the (Armorless) state. (Use Again): X.Borg stops spraying fire and immediately detonates his (Firaga Armor).

skills.name: Transcendence
skills.description: Xavier enhances his subsequent skills each time his skill hits an enemy hero. (Stage I:) Increases Movement Speed by 50% when subsequent skills hit, decaying over 1.2s. (Stage II:) Width of subsequent skills will be greatly increased. (Stage III:) Skill Cooldown reduced by 4s (12s for the Ultimate). At (Stage III), Xavier enters the (Transcendence) state. (Transcendence:) All of Xavier's skills are enhanced to (Stage III) state for 5s (this duration is extended by 1s each time Xavier's skill hits an enemy).

skills.name: Infinite Extension
skills.description: Xavier fires a Mystic Bullet that deals 425( +150% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies it passes through. The Bullet's flying distance increases each time it hits an enemy or the (Mystic Barrier) (up to 5 times).

skills.name: Mystic Field
skills.description: Xavier conjures a (Mystic Barrier) that lasts 5s. Enemies that come into contact with the Barrier will take 125( +60% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) and be slowed by 50%, while allies will gain 50% extra Movement Speed that decays over 1.2s. When hit by Xavier's other skills, the Barrier expands into a (Mystic Field) for 3s, dealing 300( +120% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies within and immobilizing them for 1.2s.

skills.name: Dawning Light
skills.description: Xavier unleashes a beam of Mystic magic in the target direction, dealing 650( +150% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to all enemies along its path. Once cast, he also directly enters the (Transcendence) state and resets the state's duration.

skills.name: Heavenly Vow
skills.description: Yi Sun-shin attacks with his (longbow) or (glaive) according to his distance from the target. (Weapon Mastery): After each weapon swap, the next two attacks will be enhanced. The first attack deals 70%-100% Crit Damage and the second attack deals 55%-70% Crit Damage. Each enhanced attack grants 20% Movement Speed for 1s and reduces the cooldown of (Traceless) by 1s. After every 180s or when Yi Sun-shin respawns, a (Turtle Ship) will spawn at the allied Base. Yi Sun-shin can board the (Turtle Ship), gaining 60% Movement Speed (decays to after s) and enhancing (Traceless).

skills.name: Traceless
skills.description: Yi Sun-shin dashes forward and slashes with his glaive, dealing 150( +40% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) and becoming immune to control effects for 1s.

skills.name: Blood Floods
skills.description: (Tap): Yi Sun-shin slashes swiftly with his glaive, dealing 240( +80% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). (Hold): Yi Sun-shin shoots a powerful arrow, dealing 240( +80% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to the target. The arrow's damage scales with the hold time, up to 200%. This damage decays with the number of enemies hit but can't go below 40%. His Movement Speed is reduced by 20% while holding the skill. Yi Sun-shin gains (Weapon Mastery) immediately when this skill is used.

skills.name: Mountain Shocker
skills.description: (Passive): Increases the damage of (Heavenly Vow's) first enhanced Basic Attack by 10% and second enhanced Basic Attack by 5%. (Active): Yi Sun-shin commands the naval fleet to launch 3 waves of cannon shots on the locations of all enemy heroes, revealing their positions and dealing 150( +50% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in the area with each wave. (When a target is hit multiple times by the same wave, a maximum of 150% damage will be dealt.)

skills.name: Leave It to Me
skills.description: If there are no allied heroes within 4 units of Yin, his damage is increased to 120% and he gains 8% Spell Vamp.

skills.name: Charged Punch
skills.description: Yin gains 60% extra Movement Speed (decays over 3s). Yin can launch an enhanced Basic Attack that deals 25( +100% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) within the duration. Upon hitting an enemy with the enhanced Basic Attack, Yin will throw another charged punch forward, dealing 360( +200% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in the path. Successfully throwing the charged punch reduces the skill's cooldown by 35%.

skills.name: Instant Blast
skills.description: Yin dashes forward, leaving a (Golden Ring) behind while dealing 75( +35% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies along the way. He gains 30% extra Damage Reduction for 4s if an enemy hero is hit. After 1s, the (Golden Ring) will catch up with Yin, dealing 150( +70% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies it passes through and stunning them for 1s.

skills.name: My Turn
skills.description: After a short delay, Yin locks onto an enemy hero ((cannot lock onto pets or clones)) and pulls them into his domain for up to 8s and turns into (Lieh). When in the domain, the two cannot be affected by other heroes' skills. (Lieh) has stronger skills and 50 extra (Physical & Magic Defense) that last 8s. The domain will end early if either of the two is killed. If (Lieh) successfully kills the enemy, he'll recover 20% Max HP, leave the domain with the cooldowns of (Frenzy Strike) and (Instant Blast) reset, and continue to fight as (Lieh) for 8s. If Yin fails to pull his target into his domain, the skill will enter a 3s cooldown.

skills.name: Cursing Touch
skills.description: Yu Zhong applies (Sha Residue) to enemy heroes every time he deals damage to them. (Sha Residue) erupts upon reaching 5 stacks on a target. Then it begins consuming 1 stack every 0.4s to deal (Physical Damage) equal to 30( +20% Extra Physical Attack) plus 2.5% of the target's lost HP to the target. Each stack consumed restores 6% of Yu Zhong's lost HP. When (Sha Residue) erupts, Yu Zhong also gains 30% Movement Speed for 3s.

skills.name: Dragon Tail
skills.description: Yu Zhong infuses his power into his cloak and turns it into a weapon, which starts to attack nearby enemies after a short delay. The inner area of the cloak deals 220( +100% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage), whereas the sharpened edge deals 275% damage and applies 2 stacks of (Sha Residue).

skills.name: Soul Grip
skills.description: Yu Zhong unleashes the Dragon Soul, dealing 150( +120% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to all enemies in front and slowing them by 60% for 1s. Upon hitting an enemy, Yu Zhong's next Basic Attack will be enhanced, dealing 108( +100% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). Upon hitting multiple enemies, the enhanced Basic Attack will apply multiple stacks of (Sha Residue) and deal up to 200% damage.

skills.name: Furious Dive
skills.description: Yu Zhong leaps towards the designated area with his full strength, dealing 180( +90% Extra Physical Attack) (Physical Damage). He is able to dash one more time in the movement direction. After a short delay, enemies within the area of effect will be knocked airborne for 1s and take 180( +90% Extra Physical Attack) additional (Physical Damage).

skills.name: Galactic Power
skills.description: Yve gains a stack of (Galactic Power) each time she hits an enemy hero with (Void Blast) or (Void Crystal) (up to 10 stacks). Each stack of (Galactic Power) allows Yve to launch an extra attack on the next (Real World Manipulation) cast and increases the amount of shield gained by 5%.

skills.name: Void Blast
skills.description: Yve detonates (Galactic Energy) at the target location, dealing 200( +80% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies in the area and 145( +60% Total Magic Power) extra (Magic Damage) to those in the center. Successfully hitting an enemy grants Yve 55% extra Movement Speed (halved if a non-hero enemy is hit) that decays over 1s. If an enemy hero is hit in the center of the area, the cooldown of this skill is reduced by 0.5s.

skills.name: Void Crystal
skills.description: Yve summons a (Void Crystal) at the target location, dealing 220( +40% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to nearby enemies. (Use Again): Yve commands the Crystal to fire materialized energy in the target direction for 2.7s, dealing 105( +20% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) every 0.45s to enemies hit and slowing them by 25%. Enemies hit multiple times are slowed by an extra 5% for each hit after the first (up to 50%).

skills.name: Real World Manipulation
skills.description: Yve creates a Starfield that lasts 15s and gains a 400( +120% Total Magic Power) Shield. Within the duration, you can Tap or Swipe the screen to attack up to 15 times. (Tap): Deals 340( +120% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies in the target area. (Swipe): Deals 65( +10% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) every 0.45s to enemies in the target area for 2.7s and slows them by 50%. Enemies leaving or entering the Starfield will be immobilized for 0.8s (only once against the same target). Yve cannot be displaced while the Starfield is active, and the Starfield will remain even if Yve is controlled (except for Suppression).

skills.name: Celestial Armament
skills.description: Phoenix Crown: When Zetian hits enemy heroes with Phoenix Strike or Phoenix Descent, she gains 1% Spell Vamp for 5s (up to 10 stacks). Celestial Robe: The power of the Phoenix periodically protects Zetian, knocking back and stunning any enemy hero who approaches her, dealing 90(+10*Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage. She also gains a 300(+20*Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) shield for 3s. Cooldown: 120s.

skills.name: Phoenix Strike
skills.description: Zetian unleashes a Phoenix Wave in the target direction. If it hits an enemy, she automatically casts another wave (up to 3 times). Zetian can cast other skills during this time. The waves deal 150 (+50% Total Magic Power), 150 (+50% Total Magic Power), and 360 (+120% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage, respectively. The 3rd wave has a larger area and pulls enemies toward the cast direction (not considered a control effect). The Spell Vamp ratio against minions is only 65%.

skills.name: Phoenix Descent
skills.description: Zetian summons a Phoenix Spirit at the target location, dealing 150 (+45% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applying a brief 50% slow effect to enemies in the area. The Phoenix Spirit hovers at the location for 3s, dealing 20 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage every 0.5s and reducing enemies' Magic Defense by 10% while revealing their surrounding area. While the Phoenix Spirit is active, Zetian can use this skill again to command it to charge toward a designated location, dealing 150 (+45% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applying a brief 50% slow effect upon arrival.

skills.name: Fury of the Phoenix
skills.description: Zetian calls upon her divine mandate and the hearts of her people, granting all allied heroes 40% Movement Speed that gradually decays over 3s, while bringing divine retribution upon all enemy heroes, dealing 400 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and stunning them for 0.8s. Zetian gains vision of all enemy heroes during this time. Zetian can cast other skills while channeling this skill.

skills.name: Decimation
skills.description: Upon death, Zhask summons a frenzied (Nightmaric Spawn) on the spot, which gradually loses HP over time until death.

skills.name: Nightmaric Spawn
skills.description: Zhask summons a (Nightmaric Spawn) that gains 50% of his Attributes plus an additional 20 (Magic Power). (Nightmaric Spawn) will automatically attack nearby enemies, each attack dealing 120 (+(120% Magic Power)) (Magic Damage). After every 3 attacks, it fires a (Death Ray) at the target, dealing 90 (+(15% Magic Power)) (Magic Damage) and slowing them by up to 60% for 0.6s. If Zhask is too far away from (Nightmaric Spawn), it will disappear. (Death Ray) is considered a Basic Attack but cannot Crit. (Fusion Enhanced): The damage of (Nightmaric Spawn) is increased to 200%, and it can be repositioned.

skills.name: Mind Eater
skills.description: Zhask fires a penetrating psychic beam in the designated direction, dealing 300( +100% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies along the way. (Nightmaric Spawn) will also cast (Mind Eater) at the same location. If an enemy is hit by both beams, they will be stunned for 0.5s. (Fusion Enhanced): The damage of Zhask and (Nightmaric Spawn) is fused together, dealing 540( +180% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage).

skills.name: Hive Clones
skills.description: Zhask releases a swarm of (Hive Clones) in the targeted direction. The clones will explode and deal 110( +35% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage) to enemies on contact, reducing their Movement Speed by 80% for 1s. If (Hive Clones) find no target, they will burrow into the ground and ambush enemies passing by. (Fusion Enhanced): Zhask releases several swarms of (Hive Clones). Subsequent damage dealt to the same target decays to 20%.

skills.name: Crimson Butterflies
skills.description: Every time Zhuxin channels Lantern Flare, she converts the Mana spent into up to 15 Crimson Butterflies to follow her Spirit Lantern. After Zhuxin stops channeling Lantern Flare, the Crimson Butterflies will gradually disappear, each restoring 5% of her Max Mana. Zhuxin has a naturally high base Max Mana, but it doesn't scale with her level.

skills.name: Fluttering Grace
skills.description: Zhuxin deals 150 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to all enemies in a fan-shaped area and applies 1 stack(s) of Soul Snare. Zhuxin also slows all enemy heroes hit by 20% and gains 20% of extra Movement Speed herself for 1.5s.

skills.name: Lantern Flare
skills.description: Hold: Hold the skill button to move the Spirit Lantern. It deals 35 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to all enemies in range every 0.33s (Magic Bonus increases to 60% against minions) and applies Soul Snare to enemy heroes hit. When an enemy hero reaches 10 stacks of Soul Snare, the Crimson Butterflies capture them, pulling them airborne for 1s. Release: Throw all captured enemies to the target location, dealing 200 (+150% Total Magic Power) (+ 10% captured target's Max HP) Magic Damage to all enemies in the area. If an enemy is hit multiple times, subsequent damage decays by 80%. After a target is captured, Soul Snare cannot stack on them again for 4s. During this time, this skill deals 15% extra damage to that target.

skills.name: Crimson Beacon
skills.description: Zhuxin blinks to the target location, gaining a 400 (+100% Total Magic Power) shield and creating a field for 6s. The field deals 30 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applies 1 stack of Soul Snare to nearby enemies every 0.5s.

skills.name: Dragon Flurry
skills.description: After every 3 Basic Attacks, Zilong triggers (Dragon Flurry) on the next Basic Attack, hitting the target 3 times. Each hit deals 30( +40% Total Physical Attack) Basic Attack damage and heals himself for 30( +20% Total Physical Attack) HP.

skills.name: Spear Flip
skills.description: Zilong flings the target enemy over his head, dealing 250( +80% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage).

skills.name: Spear Strike
skills.description: Zilong lunges at the target enemy, dealing 250( +60% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) and reducing their Physical Defense by 15 for 2s. He then launches a Basic Attack on the same target. The cooldown of (Spear Strike) is reset each time Zilong kills an enemy.

skills.name: Supreme Warrior
skills.description: Zilong removes all slow effects on himself and gains 40% Movement Speed, 45% Attack Speed, and Slow Immunity for 7.5s. For the duration, he can trigger (Dragon Flurry) after every 2 Basic Attacks (instead of the previous 3).
